title: tritomanthe uvaria
side_effects: Tritomanthe uvaria can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and vomiting, as well as allergic reactions like skin rashes and respiratory problems. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant may lead to seizures, coma, or even death. Furthermore, improper preparation and dosage of Tritomanthe uvaria may also cause cardiovascular issues, including rapid heartbeat and blood pressure fluctuations. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using this plant for health benefits to avoid any potential side effects.
